properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
Paving available stone in the river banks and Planting trees
Dry rubble packing (with locally found rubble, size over 225mm )-Along the river banks
Vegetative cover improving around the river bank with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid interval
Replanting bamboo species around the river bank 
Miscellaneous
Contingencies (10%)
